meaning: International Astrophysical Decade 国际天体物理十年
examples: Developers can, however, use other networks even while using iAd.
Apple will allow external developers to pocket 60% of AD revenue from iAd.
Eighteen months since its acquisition, most would say that iAd has been a disappointment for Apple.
Apple takes a cut of 40% from total iAd revenues and gives the rest to app developers.
